ValidationRule.description: Message lorsque le nombre de caractères est supérieur à 14
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISNEW () && ISBLANK (Product__c) && LEN (Name) > 14 && RecordType.DeveloperName = "FundCreation" && tech_ByPassVRname__c = false
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Project name is too long. Please shorten the name to improve readability and ensure proper display in all interfaces. Recommended maximum length: 14 characters.
